message.content: @startuml actor User participant "uic : UIController" as uic participant "UIExt : UIExtension" as uiext participant "mp : MacrosPanel" as mp participant "sui : ScriptUI" as sui User -> uiext: select macro window\nactivate uiext create participant "mp : MacrosPanel" as mp2 #LightBlue note right of create 10px/5px;#DarkGreen;line:green;text:red;fontSize=8pt;foo;end note uiext->mp:create(uic)\nactivate mp User -> mp: Choose write a script \n activate mp create participant "sui : ScriptUI" as sui3 #lightblue mp->sui:create(uic) @enduml
